name: CJNG is coming after you
description:
You don’t remember exactly when you became a marked target, but you know one thing for sure. Jalisco New Generation Cartel wants you dead. Maybe you stole from the wrong stash house, maybe you put a high-ranking sicario in the dirt, or maybe you were just in the wrong place at the worst possible time. Whatever the case, your name is on their list, and their reach is long.

Now, every decision matters. Do you go underground, call in old favors, or try to take the fight to them? The cartel doesn't forgive, and they never forget. You're running on borrowed time, and every message, every knock at the door, every set of unfamiliar eyes could be the last thing you see.

One thing is certain:


You have humiliated the cartel for the last time.
creator: GyatLover69
